A must-have GGDB fan slipper. Golden Goose Super-star classic shape—timeless and extremely comfortable, fits all foot types, visually slimming. Easy to wear. Upper: silk calfskin, imported glitter, and lamb suede patchwork; smooth, soft yet durable, breathable. Lining: terry cloth. Insole: pure water-dyed cowhide with 3.5cm internal lift. Sizes: 35-40.

Autumn sporty dad sneakers, another day GGDB hits the mark. Dad Star – what you see is what you get, simply the best! This vintage style is all about that worn-in vibe. Suede paired with mesh tennis shoe material, featuring irregular distressed craftsmanship for a subtle touch of sophistication. 

G’s “little dirty shoes” are surprisingly low-key. As a unisex design, they’re perfect for couples, effortlessly stylish without overthinking. 

Details: suede and mesh combo, cream leather star, casual distressed finish, inner terry cloth with calf leather trim, leather insole, original custom TPU sole with a 3cm thick heel. Sizes 35-44 (couple sizes).

GGDB Asia-Pacific exclusive Superstar new color is here! Sparkling pink star heel makes it irresistibly cute. Known as the “too beautiful to wear” dirty sneaker. Cracked texture with metallic pink stars plus crystal heel creates a striking visual impact! Full premium feel. Made of cowhide with original cracked texture technique; stars are also cowhide, hand-polished, authentic steel logo, Swarovski crystal heel. Terry cloth lining, 3.5 cm leather insole, rubber outsole. Sizes: 35-40.

Winter’s latest GGDB distressed sneakers offer unbeatable comfort and warmth! Made entirely from imported shearling leather, crafted with precision for a unique experience. This reseller edition features GGDB’s iconic distressed look, gaining popularity even before classic white sneakers. Breaking traditional aesthetics, these sneakers have no break-in issues, a 3cm thick sole for added height, and a natural worn effect that highlights individuality. Easy to maintain, perfect for the lazy wearer. Details include genuine leopard pony hair, lambskin insoles, and terry cloth lining. Sizes: 35-40.

GGDB is a must-have for everyone—versatile, fashionable, and flawless. Its simple design instantly recalls classic vintage Nike sneakers. The pink distressed shoes are very girly, with a sparkling pink finish that’s simply stunning. The slightly worn look prevents the pink from feeling too sweet, perfect for spring.

The soul of the shoe lies in its last, showcasing elegant lines and perfect comfort. All aging and distressing are done entirely by hand, with complex craftsmanship for a natural, authentic look—not artificial. The stitched upper is durable and flexible. The rounded toe offers freedom and comfort, while the dashed side lines outline a star, adding a unique, fresh touch.

Inside, there’s a removable soft leather insole with thin leather and thick latex padding. The hidden 3.5cm heel lift makes you look taller and slimmer. Ergonomically designed for ultimate comfort and wearability.

Important: every pair’s distressed finish is handmade, so each is slightly unique. We ensure the fit and comfort match official retail standards exactly. The irregular hand distressing is what makes them truly beautiful.

Sizes: 35–40. Comes in original box packaging.

GGDB Vsta Series "Dirty Sneakers"

Launched in 2014 by the founder, the Vstar series draws design inspiration from the SUPER-STAR but features a simpler structure. It blends classic casual style with 1970s rock vibes. This globally popular series offers exceptional comfort and versatility, making it a standout in footwear.

Key features:
- Bordered toe design
- Vintage, easy-to-match style with subtle details
- White leather with a deliberately distressed look
- Suitable for all seasons, especially spring and summer
- Comfortable wrapped sole
- High-quality, attractive materials
- Towel fabric lining for breathability and sweat absorption, ideal for barefoot wear in summer
- Each pair is handcrafted and uniquely aged

Available sizes: 35-40
